overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a desert canyon environment. The character moves from a stone settlement building through arid desert terrain with red rock formations and cacti, following a path toward a distant city visible through a canyon passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert settlement edge with stone tavern building

agents.ego_description: running away from the settlement building into the open desert terrain

entered.detail: large stone structure with arched entrance and wooden beams
wooden platforms and stairs attached to the building
tall red rock formations forming the canyon walls in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a desert settlement with a stone tavern building on the left. The character runs forward along a dirt path away from the structure, with vast red rock cliffs visible in the distance under a clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert with scattered cacti and wooden signpost

events.description: location discovery text 'CUT-CLIFFS' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: running through desert terrain passing tall saguaro cacti

notable_agents.action: small desert rabbit or rodent scurries across the path

entered.detail: tall saguaro cacti scattered across the desert landscape
wooden directional sign structure with crossbeams

segments.scene_description: The character runs through open desert terrain dotted with tall cacti. A location discovery notification appears. The character passes a wooden signpost while a small animal crosses the path, with the red rock formations now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon path lined with ancient red stone pillars

events.description: entering narrow canyon passage lined with tall red stone pillars

agents.ego_description: running between red rock pillars toward the distant city

entered.detail: tall rectangular red stone pillars marking the canyon path
steep red rock canyon walls on both sides
decorative lantern hanging from a wooden post
large settlement with towers visible through the canyon gap

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow canyon passage flanked by tall red stone pillars. The character runs between these ancient markers as the canyon walls rise on both sides. A distant city with towers becomes visible through the canyon opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon exit approaching oasis city with palm trees

events.description: desert transitions to green valley with palm trees and city walls becoming visible

agents.ego_description: approaching the city through the canyon exit with palm trees lining the path

entered.detail: tall palm trees indicating an oasis environment
lush green bushes and grass replacing dry desert scrub
ancient stone wall fragments along the path

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a green valley oasis with palm trees and lush vegetation replacing the arid desert. The character continues toward the city, which grows larger and more detailed as the distance closes. Ancient stone ruins line the final approach to the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an arid desert landscape that gradually transforms into a lush valley oasis. It begins at a desert settlement, moving away from a stone tavern building along a dirt path toward vast red rock cliffs under a clear sky. As the character runs through open terrain dotted with tall cacti and passes a wooden signpost, the scene shifts into a narrow canyon passage flanked by towering red stone pillars. The camera then follows the path through these ancient markers as the canyon walls rise, revealing a distant city with towers through the opening ahead. Finally, the arid environment opens into a green valley oasis filled with palm trees and lush vegetation, with the city growing larger and more detailed as the character passes ancient stone ruins.
